name: LuxuryLotionSens
descrip: Increases the target's sensitivity, lowering their defense!
outcome: [AttackerName] pours the tingle inducing lubricant over [TargetName]'s body, leaving [TargetHimOrHer] gasping with pleasure as [AttackerHeOrShe] gently spreads the lotion across [TargetHisOrHer] soft skin with teasing fingers.
miss: [AttackerName] goes to pour the tingle inducing lubricant over [TargetName]'s body, but the bottle ends up clattering to the floor instead, emptying its contents worthlessly.
statusOutcome: As [AttackerName] kneads [TargetName]'s skin with the lotion, [TargetHeOrShe] is left shivering as their sensitivity increases.
